We value your privacy

We use cookies to enhance your browsing experience, serve personalized ads or content, and analyze our traffic. By clicking "Accept All", you consent to our use of cookies.

Reject AllAccept All

Customize Consent Preferences![Close](https://cdn-cookieyes.com/assets/images/close.svg)

We use cookies to help you navigate efficiently and perform certain functions. You will find detailed information about all cookies under each consent category below.

The cookies that are categorized as "Necessary" are stored on your browser as they are essential for enabling the basic functionalities of the site. ... Show more

NecessaryAlways Active

Necessary cookies are required to enable the basic features of this site, such as providing secure log-in or adjusting your consent preferences. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable data.

Functional

Functional cookies help perform certain functionalities like sharing the content of the website on social media platforms, collecting feedback, and other third-party features.

Analytics

Analytical cookies are used to understand how visitors interact with the website. These cookies help provide information on metrics such as the number of visitors, bounce rate, traffic source, etc.

Performance

Performance cookies are used to understand and analyze the key performance indexes of the website which helps in delivering a better user experience for the visitors.

Advertisement

Advertisement cookies are used to provide visitors with customized advertisements based on the pages you visited previously and to analyze the effectiveness of the ad campaigns.

Uncategorized

Other uncategorized cookies are those that are being analyzed and have not been classified into a category as yet.

# District 225

### **Downtown Miami / 2025**

37 Stories / 347 Residences of
Studios, 1 & 2 Bedrooms

**225 N Miami Ave, Miami, FL 33128, USA**

[+1.305.647.2636](tel:13056472636)

District 225 is a 37-story luxury residential building in the administrative and legal center of Downtown Miami. This fantastic tower has fully furnished studio condos up to 2 bedrooms, with the excellent option of being able to rent them through AirBnb and make rental income with vacation rentals. The project has been 100% sold in pre-construction and is an excellent investment opportunity in the new center of Miami.

[18 Condos For Sale](https://miamiresidential.com/district225/#ForSale) from $469,000 to $1,000,000

[13 Condos For Rent](https://miamiresidential.com/district225/#ForRent),
from $2,300 to $6,150

Average Listing: $1,428 x SF ($15,373 x M2)

CONDOS FOR SALE

CONDOS FOR RENT

[18 Condos For Sale](https://miamiresidential.com/district225/#ForSale) from $469,000 to $1,000,000

[13 Condos For Rent](https://miamiresidential.com/district225/#ForRent),
from $2,300 to $6,150

Average Listing: $1,428 x SF ($15,373 x M2)

## Features

### Building Features

- Rooftop Amenity Deck with spa, fire pit and summer kitchen
- Basketball & Racquetball Courts, and Rock climbing wall
- Co-working spaces
- Fitness Center
- Double-height lobby
- 24/7 Security services
- 24/7 valet services and self parking.
- On-site cafe
- Electric bikes with charging stations are available for residents on the go.
- On-demand full housekeeping services available
- Climatized receiving and storage room
- Resort Style pool deck with lounge and recreation room

### Residence Features

- All residential interiors are designed by award- winning interior design firm Meshberg Design
- Smart home technology experience for seamless personalization with the touch of a button
- All residences come equipped with a contemporary lighting package
- Fully built-out closets in all residences
- Built in top-of-the-line in-unit washer and dryer
- Flooring selections included with specifications recommended by Meshberg Design
- Pre-wired for high-speed communications and data connection
- Kitchens feature custom Italian cabinetry curated by Meshberg Design
- Smeg appliance package includes integrated paneled microwave, dishwasher, built-in convection oven and refrigerator/ freezer
- Primary bathrooms offer rain showers and custom Italian vanities
- Dornbracht and Duravit bathroom fixtures, features and accessories
- 9.8 ft ceilings

![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/05/14-The-District-Miami-Dining-Area-e1678238045217.jpg)

## Developers

![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/04/Developer-Related-Group.jpg)

The Related group’s team develops a wide range of developments, from luxury high-rise condominiums to more affordable ones; their main focus is creating culture, design and lifestyle-infused properties continues to revitalize urban neighborhoods. They have been working for 4 decades. Some of their prestigious investments include [Hyde Beach House](https://miamiresidential.com/hydebeachhouse/), [50 Biscayne](https://miamiresidential.com/50biscayne), [Brickell Heights](https://miamiresidential.com/brickellheightseast/), [Icon Brickell](https://miamiresidential.com/iconbrickell), [SLS Lux](https://miamiresidential.com/slslux/), [Baccarat Residences](https://miamiresidential.com/baccaratresidences/), [The Crosby](https://miamiresidential.com/thecrosby) and many others in South Florida.
